column1: # 8 MB partition table with the LittleFS partition (labelled 'spiffs'
# for compatibility — Arduino-ESP32's LittleFS lib mounts on a SPIFFS-
# subtype partition) sized big enough for the web UI + log buffer.
#   nvs        16 KB    @ 0x9000     — Preferences / NVS (home location etc.)
#   app0       2.75 MB  @ 0x10000    — main firmware (boots from here)
#   spiffs    2.4375 MB @ 0x590000   — LittleFS data partition (web UI files)
# NOTE: a coredump partition would be nice for post-mortem debugging
# but inserting one moves app0 off the well-trodden 0x10000 offset
# which broke the bootloader sequence on the Heltec V2 (rapid SYS_RST

column2: no app code executed). Keep this layout boring
